views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main overview showing total monthly/yearly spend in a stat grid, budget progress ring, category donut chart preview, upcoming renewals list, and floating quick-add button

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Add or edit a subscription with name, amount, category, billing cycle, renewal day, and active toggle

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Scrollable list of all subscriptions grouped by category with active/inactive filter, search, and sort by cost or name

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Category spending donut chart, monthly cost trend line chart over 6 months, cost-per-day callout, and ranked smart insights

viewModelComputedProperties.name: totalMonthlyCost
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of all active subscriptions normalized to monthly cost (weekly×4.33, quarterly÷3, yearly÷12)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: categoryBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Monthly cost grouped by SubscriptionCategory with percentage of total, sorted descending by amount

viewModelComputedProperties.name: upcomingRenewals
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Active subscriptions renewing within the next 7 days based on renewalDay vs current day of month, sorted by renewal date

viewModelComputedProperties.name: mostExpensiveSubscription
viewModelComputedProperties.description: The single highest monthly-normalized cost among active subscriptions

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageMonthlyCost
viewModelComputedProperties.description: totalMonthlyCost ÷ activeCount, or 0 if no active subscriptions

viewModelComputedProperties.name: budgetProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: totalMonthlyCost ÷ monthlyBudgetGoal as 0.0–1.0+ ratio for the progress ring

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyTrendData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total monthly cost snapshot for each of the last 6 months, computed from entry creation dates and isActive status

viewModelComputedProperties.name: categoryChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Formatted category breakdown for donut chart with assigned color per category

viewModelComputedProperties.name: topInsights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Up to 5 smart insight strings: highest category, subs above average cost, budget status, spending creep detection, potential savings from inactive subs

viewModelComputedProperties.name: savingsStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive months where totalMonthlyCost stayed at or below the budget goal

viewModelComputedProperties.name: inactiveSubscriptionsCost
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of monthly-normalized cost of all inactive subscriptions, representing potential savings if fully cancelled

dailyGoal.description: Monthly subscription budget cap — the user's target maximum spend on all recurring subscriptions per month

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A month counts toward the savings streak if total active subscription cost (monthly-normalized) is at or below the monthly budget goal at month-end
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Track total monthly cost over 6-month rolling window by snapshotting active subscriptions at each month boundary. Compare current month to 3-month rolling average to detect spending creep. Flag if month-over-month increase exceeds 10%.
insights: Total monthly burn rate with daily and yearly equivalents for perspective
Most expensive category by percentage of total spend
Individual subscriptions costing more than the average — review candidates
Upcoming renewals in next 7 days with renewal amounts
Budget utilization percentage with over/under indicator and color coding
Month-over-month cost delta highlighting newly added or removed subscriptions
Potential monthly savings from cancelling all currently inactive subscriptions
Cost-per-day framing to make abstract monthly totals tangible
Savings streak length with encouragement messaging
Spending creep alert when 3-month trend shows consistent increases
